name: Kria Resources Ltd.
description: Kria Resources Ltd. was a Canadian-based mining company focused on the exploration and development of high-quality base and precious metal assets. The company primarily targeted lead, zinc, and copper deposits, alongside gold and silver projects. Notably, Kria Resources was involved in the development of the Halfmile Mine in New Brunswick. The company was publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol KRI until it was delisted in 2011 following a successful acquisition and business combination transaction.
